results.title: Fresno Falcons launch Freddie’s Flock Kids Club
results.description: The Fresno Falcons announced recently the launch of Freddie’s Flock, the official kids club of the Fresno Falcons, created for young fans ages 3-14.

results.title: NASCAR uses 3 of its youngest drivers for Rolling Stones collaboration
results.description: JOLIET, Ill. (AP) — The first Rolling Stones album was released in 1964. NASCAR driver Connor Zilisch was born in 2006.

results.title: Uganda: Buweekula Still Searching for First Win After Narrow Defeat to Buddu
results.description: [Nile Post] Buddu Ssaza football team secured a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Buweekula in a closely contested Masaza Cup fixture at the NTC Grounds in Mubende, condemning the hosts to a third consecutive match without a win.

results.title: Uganda: Isa League Expands Season Three With More Teams, New Basketball Tournament
results.description: [Nile Post] The International Schools Alumni (ISA) League has kicked off its third season with an expanded lineup of schools and teams, alongside new initiatives aimed at strengthening Uganda's growing alumni sports community.
